heading: Printing and binding as public document of Precedents of House of Representatives; number of sets authorized
label: 28b Printing and binding as public document of Precedents of House of Representatives; number of sets authorized
notes: References in TextThe Legislative Branch Appropriation Act, 1966, referred to in text, is , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 89–9079 Stat. 265July 27, 1965
amendments: References in TextThe Legislative Branch Appropriation Act, 1966, referred to in text, is , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 89–9079 Stat. 265July 27, 1965

children.label: a
children.text: There shall be printed and bound as a public document two thousand sets of the Prec­edents of the House of Representatives compiled and prepared by Lewis Deschler (hereinafter in sections 28b to 28e of this title referred to as the “Precedents”) in accordance with the provisions of the Legislative Branch Appropriation Act, 1966 (; ).Public Law 89–9079 Stat. 265

children.label: b
children.text: The number of sets authorized to be printed and bound by or pursuant to sections 28b to 28e of this title shall be in lieu of the usual number of copies for binding and distribution required by .section 701 of title 44
